detail.title: Feb 2026 Product Innovation
detail.content:
Below are this month’s new Seller Center features and updates. These are designed to help your agency drive stronger campaign performance, improve operational efficiency, and scale seller growth more effectively. --- # TikTok Shop Campaigns ## 🛍️ Buy More Save More (BMSM) + Buy X Get Y (BXGY)
**📌 What it is:** BMSM and BXGY promotions are now unified into a single setup flow in Seller Center. Sellers can easily configure bulk discounts (e.g., spend more, save more) or bundle offers (e.g., buy one, get one) from one streamlined interface. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Makes it easier to launch and test different discount strategies * Drives higher AOV through bundling and upsell mechanics * Reduces setup friction when managing multiple promotions * Enables more flexible campaign planning across SKUs **⏩ Agency action:** Recommend BMSM for increasing basket size, use BXGY for inventory clearing or bundle strategies, and incorporate into campaign and promo calendars 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=7160023202432811&role=1&course_type=1&from=search). --- # Seller Growth ## 📈 Growth Benefits Center
**📌 What it is:** Sellers can now replace unavailable product links without deleting or reposting their videos. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Prevents loss of GMV when products go out of stock or are delisted * Keeps high-performing content active * Reduces creator downtime or manual content fixes ⏩ **Agency action:** Encourage sellers to check their relink alerts daily and replace unavailable SKUs immediately. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?from=feature_guide&identity=1&knowledge_id=3759443559679790&role=2). --- ## 🎥 Video Assistant: AI-Powered Content Creation
**📌 What it is:** A new centralized hub that shows sellers their current growth tier, benefits, and recommended actions to scale. It connects with Growth Opportunities to provide a full view of how to increase GMV and unlock rewards. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Gives a clear framework for seller growth planning * Helps prioritize highest-impact actions * Makes performance gaps and next steps more visible * Aligns seller efforts with TikTok Shop growth incentives **⏩ Agency action:** Use this as a baseline for seller strategy conversations, align monthly goals to tier progression and recommended actions, and track progress and adjust plans based on insights. --- ## 🔁 Product Subscriptions – Modify Discount
**📌 What it is:** Sellers can now reduce subscription discount rates for future subscribers while maintaining the original discount for existing subscribers. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Provides more control over margins * Enables seasonal or promotional pricing adjustments * Protects existing subscriber relationships * Supports long-term subscription strategy **⏩ Agency action:** Review subscription pricing strategies with sellers, adjust discounts based on seasonality or performance, and balance growth vs. profitability. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=437903906653998&course_type=1#EBA300CF). --- ## Shoppable Video ## 🎥 Shoppable Video Content Management Upgrade
**📌 What it is:** An upgraded content management hub in Seller Center that allows sellers to view, filter, and take action on all shoppable videos. Replaces the previous “Manage Content” page with improved tools. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Makes it easier to monitor content performance at scale * Speeds up identification of high- and low-performing videos * Improves workflow for optimizing and promoting content * Reduces manual tracking across multiple videos **⏩ Agency action:** Use this to audit seller content regularly, identify videos to boost, iterate, or replace, and build content optimization workflows around this dashboard. --- ## 🎬 Shoppable Video Creation Entry Upgrade
**📌 What it is:** An improved entry point for creating shoppable videos within Seller Center, designed to make content creation more accessible and intuitive. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Reduces friction for sellers starting content creation * Encourages more consistent posting * Supports scaling content output across accounts **⏩ Agency action:** Encourage sellers to adopt this new flow, use it in onboarding for new sellers or content teams, and pair it with content planning and posting cadence. --- # Partner Apps ## 🧰 Zendesk for TikTok Shop **📌 What it is:** A new integration that centralizes customer support within Zendesk, allowing sellers to manage communication, support tickets, and insights in one place. **💡 Why it matters** **for agencies:** * Improves customer experience and response time * Centralizes support operations for scaling sellers * Provides better visibility into customer issues * Reduces operational fragmentation **⏩ Agency action:** Recommend for sellers with higher order volume, integrate into customer support workflows, and use insights to identify recurring issues. --- # 📌 **TLDR;** This month’s updates focus on: * Driving higher AOV (BMSM, BXGY) * Improving growth visibility and planning (Growth Benefits Center) * Scaling content operations (Shoppable Video upgrades) * Improving operational efficiency (Zendesk, subscription flexibility) 👉 Focus on helping your sellers optimize promotions, scale content, and align to growth tiers. ---
